title: Add short_id and stable array fields to issue show --json
description:
Add `short_id` to the `issue show --json` root and always emit `labels` and `dependencies` as arrays, so agents parse show output without defensive guards.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] `jit issue show <id> --json` includes a `short_id` field at the root (from `id[0:8]`) for issues in every lifecycle state.
- [ ] `labels` and `dependencies` are always present as JSON arrays (empty `[]` when none), never absent.
- [ ] CLI JSON-asserting tests cover the shape across states.

## Notes

CLI presentation only; the domain model and the server/web API are unchanged.
